description: Add `gbiv tmux new-session` command that creates a detached tmux session with one named window per ROYGBIV worktree.

userStories.title: Scaffold tmux command module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the `src/commands/tmux/` module to exist with stub files so that the compiler can resolve the new module and subsequent stories can build on it.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/commands/tmux/mod.rs` exists and defines a `tmux_command()` function returning a `clap::Command` and a `dispatch()` function
`src/commands/tmux/new_session.rs` exists with a `pub fn new_session_command(session_name: Option<&str>) -> Result<(), String>` stub that returns `Ok(())`
`src/commands/mod.rs` contains `pub mod tmux;`
`cargo build` succeeds with no errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add GbivRoot detection utility to git_utils
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a `find_gbiv_root(start: &Path) -> Option<GbivRoot>` function in `src/git_utils.rs` so that the new-session command can locate the gbiv project root from the current working directory.
acceptanceCriteria: `GbivRoot` struct exists in `src/git_utils.rs` with fields `root: PathBuf` and `folder_name: String`
`find_gbiv_root` walks upward from the given path, returning `Some(GbivRoot)` when `P/main/<basename(P)>/` exists and is a git repo
`find_gbiv_root` returns `None` when no such directory is found up to the filesystem root
Unit test passes: `find_gbiv_root` returns `Some` when called from inside a valid gbiv structure created by `gbiv init`
Unit test passes: `find_gbiv_root` returns `None` when called from a non-gbiv directory
`cargo test` passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement guard checks in new_session_command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need `new_session_command` to validate preconditions (tmux installed, inside a gbiv project, no duplicate session) before attempting any tmux operations, so that users get clear, actionable errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns `Err` with message containing 'tmux not found' when `tmux -V` fails
Returns `Err` with a message suggesting `gbiv init` when `find_gbiv_root` returns `None`
Returns `Err` with a message suggesting `tmux attach -t <name>` or `--session-name` when `tmux has-session -t <name>` succeeds
Unit test: `new_session_command` returns an error when tmux is not available
`cargo test` passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement tmux session and window creation
userStories.description: As a developer using gbiv, I want `new_session_command` to create a detached tmux session with 8 named windows (one per worktree) in ROYGBIV order so that I can immediately start working across all branches.
acceptanceCriteria: Builds the list of 8 worktree paths: `<root>/main/<folder>/`, `<root>/red/<folder>/`, ..., `<root>/violet/<folder>/`
Skips any path that does not exist on disk and prints a warning identifying the missing path
Creates the session with `tmux new-session -d -s <name> -c <main-path> -n main`
Creates windows for red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet in that order using `tmux new-window -t <name> -n <color> -c <path>`
Prints the session name and a success message on completion
Session name defaults to `GbivRoot.folder_name`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire tmux subcommand into the gbiv CLI
userStories.description: As a user, I want `gbiv tmux new-session` to be a valid CLI invocation with a `--session-name` flag so that the command is accessible from the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/main.rs` registers the `tmux` subcommand using `tmux::tmux_command()`
`src/main.rs` dispatches `("tmux", ...)` to `tmux::dispatch()`
`--session-name <name>` optional argument is defined on the `new-session` subcommand
`gbiv tmux new-session --help` exits with status 0 and shows `--session-name` in usage
`gbiv tmux` with no subcommand exits with non-zero status and prints usage help
`gbiv tmux unknown-cmd` exits with non-zero status and prints an unrecognized subcommand error
`cargo build` succeeds
Typecheck passes
